# Anywhere Learning

> Low-prep activity guides for homeschool and worldschool families. Real-world learning for ages 6-14 -- download, open on any device, and follow along with your kids.

> Full-text companion with pillar guides, blog posts, and FAQ inlined: https://anywherelearning.co/llms-full.txt

## About

- [About Anywhere Learning](https://anywherelearning.co/about): Founded by Amelie, a former classroom teacher (B.Ed, M.Ed, 15 years) who left to homeschool and worldschool her own kids. The story behind the brand and its mission.
- [FAQ](https://anywherelearning.co/faq): 19 questions and answers covering how the activities work, age ranges, refund policy, homeschool compatibility, and bundle discounts.
- [Contact](https://anywherelearning.co/contact): How to reach the Anywhere Learning team with questions or support needs.

## Products

- [Shop All Activity Guides](https://anywherelearning.co/shop): Browse 60+ low-prep activity guides across 9 categories including outdoor learning, creativity, real-world math, AI literacy, and entrepreneurship.
- [The Future-Ready Skills Map](https://anywherelearning.co/shop/future-ready-skills-map): A 42-page parent guide mapping 10 essential skills by age (0-14+) with activities, milestones, and sample weekly schedules. The starting point for the entire product line.
- [Full Seasonal Bundle](https://anywherelearning.co/shop/seasonal-bundle): 80 outdoor activities across spring, summer, fall, and winter. Language arts, maths, science, and PE in every season.
- [Creativity & Imagination Mega Bundle](https://anywherelearning.co/shop/creativity-mega-bundle): 10 project-based guides covering board game design, Rube Goldberg machines, stop-motion films, theme parks, and more.
- [Real-World Relevance Mega Bundle](https://anywherelearning.co/shop/real-world-mega-bundle): 10 guides teaching budgeting, media literacy, micro-business creation, community impact projects, and practical writing.
- [AI & Digital Literacy Bundle](https://anywherelearning.co/shop/ai-digital-bundle): 10 guides on AI basics, algorithm awareness, deepfake detection, prompt engineering, digital privacy, and ethical AI creation for ages 9-14.
- [Real-World Math Mega Bundle](https://anywherelearning.co/shop/real-world-math-bundle): 10 maths activities using real contexts -- grocery budgets, road trip calculations, sports statistics, garden geometry, and party planning.

## Free Resources

- [Free Guide: 7 Days of Real-World Learning](https://anywherelearning.co/free-guide): A free downloadable guide with 7 low-prep, real-world activities for homeschool and worldschool families — one activity a day across outdoor & nature, real-world math, creativity, AI & digital, entrepreneurship, communication, and planning. Ages 6–14. No email paywall content available on-page.

## Blog

- [Real-World Learning for Homeschool Families: The Complete Guide](https://anywherelearning.co/blog/real-world-learning-guide): Comprehensive guide to replacing curriculum-driven learning with real-world experiences across everyday life.
- [Nature-Based Learning for Homeschool Families: The Complete Guide](https://anywherelearning.co/blog/nature-based-learning-guide): How to turn any outdoor space into a hands-on classroom with observation, STEM, and creative nature activities.
- [The 5 Stages of Deschooling](https://anywherelearning.co/blog/five-stages-deschooling): What deschooling is, why stage 3 is the hardest, and how to support your family through the transition from school to homeschool.
- [New to Homeschooling? Start Here](https://anywherelearning.co/blog/new-to-homeschooling): A getting-started guide for families beginning homeschooling -- no curriculum required. Covers first steps, common fears, and practical frameworks.
- [How to Teach Kids About AI in 2026](https://anywherelearning.co/blog/ai-for-kids-2026): Practical guide to introducing AI concepts to children without fear or hype, with hands-on activities for different age ranges.
- [10 Life Skills Every Kid Should Learn Before They're 12](https://anywherelearning.co/blog/life-skills-before-12): Ten essential real-world skills including cooking, navigation, money management, and first aid with age-appropriate milestones.
- [How to Teach Kids About Money](https://anywherelearning.co/blog/teach-kids-about-money): Practical financial literacy for kids through real-world activities like grocery budgets, saving goals, and market day simulations.
- [How We Worldschool With Two Kids](https://anywherelearning.co/blog/worldschool-two-kids): A firsthand account of worldschooling with children ages 9 and 12, covering daily structure, challenges, and what learning looks like on the road.
- [15 Outdoor STEM Challenges](https://anywherelearning.co/blog/outdoor-stem-challenges): Hands-on science, engineering, and maths challenges using natural materials that work in any backyard, park, or trail.
- [How to Raise Creative Kids](https://anywherelearning.co/blog/raise-creative-kids): Strategies for building creative confidence in children through open-ended projects, constraints, and real-world design challenges.

## Key Facts

- Created by Amelie, a former classroom teacher (B.Ed, M.Ed) with 15 years of teaching experience, now homeschool and worldschool parent
- Activities designed for ages 6-14 with built-in adaptation for different ability levels
- 220+ activities across 60+ digital guide products
- 9 learning categories: outdoor learning, creativity, real-world math, AI literacy, entrepreneurship, communication, planning, real-world skills, and start-here guides
- Every activity includes 3 flexible levels (Explore, Develop, Extend) for multi-age use
- Digital PDF format -- download and use on any device, no printing required
- 48-hour money-back guarantee on all purchases
- Based on real-world, low-prep learning philosophy -- no curriculum alignment, no worksheets

## Contact

- Website: https://anywherelearning.co
- Email: info@anywherelearning.co
- Pinterest: https://ca.pinterest.com/anywherelearning/
